AT0083.title: Industrial and Vehicle Protocol Exploitation Tools
AT0083.description: Scanning and exploitation tools for industrial control, connected-vehicle V2X, medical IoT, and edge-device protocols. Attackers may exploit protocol flaws or misconfigurations in Modbus, OPC-UA, Profinet, CAN, V2X, BLE, MQTT, and similar systems to perform unauthorized access, command injection, sensor-data forgery, medical-device control, or connected-vehicle message spoofing.
keywords: Industrial and Vehicle Protocol Exploitation Tools
